name: Memo Acevedo
abstract: Memo Acevedo is a drummer from Colombia who performs Latin/Brazilian jazz.

concerts.label: Young People's Chorus of New York City Winter Concert
concerts.venue: Isaac Stern Auditorium / Ronald O. Perelman Stage

about_quotes.speaker: Chris Parker
about_quotes.evidence: And I shared a studio with a great Columbian percussionist, Memo Acevedo.
about_quotes.doc_title: Chris Parker interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, January 5, 2023
